steps: 1. A pencil costs p pence. 2. The cost of 3 pencils is 3 times the cost of one pencil. 3. In algebra, 3 times p is written as 3p. 4. Check each option: A) p + 3 means adding 3 pence, not multiplying by 3. B) 3p means 3 multiplied by p, correct. C) p × p × p means p cubed, not 3 times p. D) 3 + p is the same as A, incorrect. E) p ÷ 3 means dividing p by 3, incorrect. 5. Only option B correctly represents the cost of 3 pencils.
